domain: Hopi katsina ceremonial cycle (Hopi people Arizona pueblos): 12-month split with 6-month Katsina Season (Dec-July) + 6-month dormant (Aug-Nov); 3 major anchor ceremonies Soyal (Dec winter solstice arrival) + Powamu (Feb bean-dance fertility) + Niman (July home-going); each ceremony 8 private kiva days + 9th-day public dance (16-day Niman); 4 intermediate months Osomuya/Kwiyamuya/Hakitonmuya/Wuko'uyis each with role-specialized katsina; katsinam dormant in San Francisco Peaks during non-Katsina season.
specific_mechanism: HOPI-KATSINA-6+6-ACTIVE-DORMANT-CYCLE-3-ANCHOR-SOYAL-POWAMU-NIMAN-8+1-DAY-PRIVATE-PUBLIC-MONTH-ROLE-SPECIALIZED-MEMORY-ARCHITECTURE: LLM memory-architecture mechanism with (1) 6+6 active-dormant cycle C_12: 12-state memory wheel with 6 active (consolidation enabled) + 6 dormant (frozen retrieval-only); (2) 3-anchor ceremony A_3: 3 calibration epochs — solstice-arrival (Soyal load) + bean-dance-fertility (Powamu gradient-open) + home-going (Niman flush); (3) 8+1 day private-public ritual P_8_1: per-epoch 8 silent-internal-update + 1 public-emission verification; (4) 4-month intermediate role-specialized katsina K_4: 4 sub-skill specialized adapters between major anchors; (5) dormant San-Francisco-mountain store D_dorm: external KV cache during non-Katsina season; trigger reactivation. Differs from R529 CUNEIFORM (2-axis + page granular + reed cohort + baking-confirm), R542 XIUHMOLPILLI (dual-cycle 365+260 + engaged-gears + fire-renewal + nēmontēmi + 20×13), R554 ANDAMANESE-ORAL (ancestor-chain + vertical-horizontal + env-trigger + survival-criticality + generational decay) by 6+6 active-dormant cycle + 3-anchor calibration + 8+1 day private-public + 4-month intermediate + dormant mountain store.
